name: Antipasto Salad with Garlic Dressing
recipeIngredient: 0.25 cup Black olives, pitted, drained, and sliced
2 cups Romaine lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------GARLIC DRESSING------------------------------
2 tablespoons Olive oil
1 tablespoon Tarragon vinegar
1.5 tablespoons Tarragon vinegar
0.25 teaspoon Prepared mustard
0.25 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce
1 clove Garlic, crushed
A pinch of Pepper
This salad is pretty hardy, but to turn it into a main dish salad, just add pasta shells, bow ties, or tortellini.
Salad: Place beans, artichoke hearts, roasted peppers and olives in salad bowl; stir in lettuce. Pour dressing over all and toss well. Arrange salami on salad greens. Sprinkle both cheeses over top.
Dressing: Shake all ingredients in a tightly covered jar. Makes about 1/4 cup dressing.
